title: strophanthus divaricatus
intro: Strophanthus divaricatus, also known as the Congo or Divaricate Strophanthus, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a medicinal plant that contains compounds such as strophanthin and ouabain, which have been used to treat various cardiovascular conditions. The medicinal properties of Strophanthus divaricatus include its ability to slow heart rate, lower blood pressure, and increase urine production, making it useful in treating conditions such as edema and heart failure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or extracts, although its use is generally limited due to concerns about toxicity and potential side effects.
